scripts.build:india: pnpm exec cross-env VITE_INSTANCE=india pnpm --filter @agce/landing build
scripts.build:abudhabi: pnpm exec cross-env VITE_INSTANCE=abudhabi pnpm --filter @agce/landing build
scripts.build:dubai: pnpm exec cross-env VITE_INSTANCE=dubai pnpm --filter @agce/landing build
scripts.build:global: pnpm exec cross-env VITE_INSTANCE=global pnpm --filter @agce/landing build
scripts.build:all-landing: pnpm build:india && pnpm build:abudhabi && pnpm build:dubai && pnpm build:global
